title: CABIDL Component Block
description: Defines a component — a building block of the system that provides and/or requires boundaries.

technology.description: The technology stack used to implement this component (e.g. "Rust", "Java + Spring Boot").

boundaries.description: The boundaries this component provides and requires.

provides.description: Boundary names that this component exposes.

requires.description: Boundary names that this component depends on.
